name: Homeassistant → Event
description: > [!NOTE] > Be sure to [follow the instructions above](https://esphome.io/components/api#api-actions) to tell Home Assistant to allow > your device to perform actions.

config_entries.label: Event
config_entries.description: The event to create - must begin with `esphome.`

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: Optional *static* data to pass along with the event.

config_entries.label: Data Template
config_entries.description: Optional template data to pass along with the event. This is evaluated on the Home Assistant side with Home Assistant's templating engine.

config_entries.label: Variables
config_entries.description: Optional variables that can be used in the `data_template`. Values are [lambdas](https://esphome.io/automations/templates#config-lambda) and will be evaluated before sending the request.
